decisions.permittedInterpretation: Human-controlled communication format, language, manner, understanding, support-person, and cultural-consideration tasks.
decisions.excludedInterpretation: Does not certify disclosure adequacy, clinical appropriateness, legal compliance, or organisational compliance.

decisions.effectiveDateBasis: 2023-07-01; official HQSC page and PDF reviewed 2026-07-15
decisions.permittedInterpretation: Human-selected review approach, consumer and whānau participation, feedback on draft findings, and human-agreed learning actions.
decisions.excludedInterpretation: Does not encode clinical causation, severity, reportability, organisational compliance, or adequacy of a particular review response.
